name: Cranberry Sauce Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Use the boiling water to dissolve the packages of raspberry jello.
2. Add cold water (1 1/4 cups) to help it set up. Let it set in the refrigerator until it's good and syrupy.
3. Meanwhile, use a blender to blend cranberry sauce and sour cream thoroughly.
4. Carefully blend the jello into the mixture.
5. Pour into dishes or mold.
6. Set for about 7 hours, or better yet, make it ahead of time.
(Note: This recipe was posted on Cooking Echo by Robert Skaer on 12-30-92 by Cathy Svitek.)
